sources.failureReason: Official page is retained as the source of truth, but Mandarin role descriptions and JavaScript-rendered lists need reviewed extraction before automated publishing.
Infold roles are monitored through Paper Games career pages and require source-language preservation.
Workday search pages can be JavaScript-heavy; exact role links are tracked when surfaced.
No open internship was verified in the current curated data; keep as watchlist.
Login and platform restrictions prevent compliant scraping.

requiredQualifications: Familiarity with <em>Where Winds Meet</em> or the Wuxia genre is highly desirable.</li> <li>Active user of social media platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Reddit, and X (Twitter).</li> <li>Strong understanding of English-speaking social media culture, internet trends, memes, and platform-specific content formats.</li> <li>Demonstrates cultural awareness and sensitivity when engaging with global gaming communities and creating content for diverse audiences.</li> <li>Strong awareness of gaming creators, influencers, streamers, and the broader gaming content ecosystem in English Community.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.</li> <li>Self-motivated, organized, and eager to learn in a fast-paced environment.</li> <li>Proficient in Chinese is highly preferred as the position will have cross team working with game development in China.</li> </ul> <p> </p> <p> </p> <p> </p>
preferredQualifications: Familiarity with <em>Where Winds Meet</em> or the Wuxia genre is highly desirable.</li> <li>Active user of social media platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Reddit, and X (Twitter).</li> <li>Strong understanding of English-speaking social media culture, internet trends, memes, and platform-specific content formats.</li> <li>Demonstrates cultural awareness and sensitivity when engaging with global gaming communities and creating content for diverse audiences.</li> <li>Strong awareness of gaming creators, influencers, streamers, and the broader gaming content ecosystem in English Community.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.</li> <li>Self-motivated, organized, and eager to learn in a fast-paced environment.</li> <li>Proficient in Chinese is highly preferred as the position will have cross team working with game development in China.</li> </ul> <p> </p> <p> </p> <p> </p>

requiredQualifications: <p> </p> <p data-start="76" data-end="97"><strong data-start="76" data-end="97">Responsibilities:</strong></p> <ul data-start="98" data-end="724"> <li data-section-id="13kmvvw" data-start="98" data-end="374">Be familiar with major overseas social media platforms (e.g., YouTube, Instagram, TikTok), identify and source suitable influencers based on campaign requirements, evaluate accounts based on data and content quality, and proactively reach out to establish collaborations;</li> <li data-section-id="v99gnb" data-start="375" data-end="530">Assist in end-to-end KOL marketing campaigns, including script ideation, market research, video translation/transcription, and post-campaign analysis;</li> <li data-section-id="1dv7kkk" data-start="531" data-end="669">Maintain relationships with influencer channels, support pricing negotiations, and assist in exploring deeper strategic partnerships;</li> <li data-section-id="cey1bz" data-start="670" data-end="724">Deliver assigned tasks on time with high quality.</li> </ul> <p data-start="731" data-end="748"><strong data-start="731" data-end="748">Requirements:</strong></p> <ul data-start="749" data-end="1289"> <li data-section-id="oqy4r4" data-start="749" data-end="830">Familiar with various social media platforms, especially international ones;</li> <li data-section-id="xy0tag" data-start="831" data-end="941">Strong communication and collaboration skills, with a proactive attitude toward tasks and responsiveness;</li> <li data-section-id="1qg6wh2" data-start="942" data-end="1028">Proficient language skills at a working level (to be assessed during interviews);</li> <li data-section-id="1g22oc" data-start="1029" data-end="1125">Available to work at least 4 days per week, with a minimum internship duration of 4 months;</li> <li data-section-id="wwpxwt" data-start="1126" data-end="1289">Currently pursuing or holding a Bachelor’s degree or above; candidates with overseas study experience and strong understanding of local culture are preferred.</li> </ul> <p> </p>

requiredQualifications: <article> <p><strong>About NetEase Games:</strong></p> <p>As a leading internet technology company based inChina, NetEase, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTES and HKEX:9999, “NetEase”) provides premium online services centered around content creation. With extensive offerings across its expanding gaming ecosystem, the Company develops and operates someof China’s most popular and longest-running mobile and PC games. Powered by industry-leading in-house R&D capabilities in China and globally, NetEase creates superior gaming experiences, inspires players, and passionately delivers value for its thriving community worldwide. By infusing play with culture and education with technology, NetEase transforms gaming into a meaningful vehicle to build a more entertaining and enlightened world.</p> <p>NetEase’s ESG initiatives are among the best in the global media and entertainment industry, earning it a distinction as one of the S&P Global Industry Movers and an “A” rating from MSCI. For more information, please visit: <a href="http://ir.netease.com/" target="_blank">http://ir.netease.com/</a></p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Responsible for building the product content ecosystem, deeply understanding and analyzing the player-driven creative ecosystem.

Plan marketing campaigns based on product features, user insights, and trending topics, participate in execution, and take accountability for communication results.</li> <li>Oversee and manage the development of the player UGC ecosystem, optimize ecosystem operation strategies, design omni-channelplayer ecosystem operation plans, and drive implementation.</li> <li>Monitor and analyze content operation data,employ various operational methods to enhance business objectives, and take responsibility for multiple metrics such as content creation, consumption, and traffic acquisition.</li> <li>Establish and maintain relationships with high-quality content creators, conduct periodic user research, and optimize the content ecosystem. </li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor's degree or above, with the ability touse English as a working language; </li> <li>Experience in overseas content creator operations and building overseas content ecosystems is preferred.</li> <li>Deep understanding and insights into content formats and creation ecosystems such as short/long videos and live streaming,strong content comprehension, and user empathy, with the ability to drive business growth from a user-centric perspective.</li> <li>Platform-oriented mindset, with experience inuser, creator, and content operations, skilled in retrospectives, and result-and data-driven approach.</li> <li>Strong sense of ownership, excellent project leadership skills, capable of handling multitasking, and independently solve problems with self-driven motivation.</li> <li>Proficiency in Chinese is required for this position, as daily communication and collaboration with game development team based in China are essential to the responsibilities of the position.</li> </ul> <p><strong data-start="190" data-end="199">Note:</strong> All UK-based positions are <strong data-start="227" data-end="260">eligible for visa sponsorship</strong>.</p> </article> <p> </p>
preferredQualifications: <article> <p><strong>About NetEase Games:</strong></p> <p>As a leading internet technology company based inChina, NetEase, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTES and HKEX:9999, “NetEase”) provides premium online services centered around content creation. With extensive offerings across its expanding gaming ecosystem, the Company develops and operates someof China’s most popular and longest-running mobile and PC games. Powered by industry-leading in-house R&D capabilities in China and globally, NetEase creates superior gaming experiences, inspires players, and passionately delivers value for its thriving community worldwide. By infusing play with culture and education with technology, NetEase transforms gaming into a meaningful vehicle to build a more entertaining and enlightened world.</p> <p>NetEase’s ESG initiatives are among the best in the global media and entertainment industry, earning it a distinction as one of the S&P Global Industry Movers and an “A” rating from MSCI. For more information, please visit: <a href="http://ir.netease.com/" target="_blank">http://ir.netease.com/</a></p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Responsible for building the product content ecosystem, deeply understanding and analyzing the player-driven creative ecosystem.

Plan marketing campaigns based on product features, user insights, and trending topics, participate in execution, and take accountability for communication results.</li> <li>Oversee and manage the development of the player UGC ecosystem, optimize ecosystem operation strategies, design omni-channelplayer ecosystem operation plans, and drive implementation.</li> <li>Monitor and analyze content operation data,employ various operational methods to enhance business objectives, and take responsibility for multiple metrics such as content creation, consumption, and traffic acquisition.</li> <li>Establish and maintain relationships with high-quality content creators, conduct periodic user research, and optimize the content ecosystem. </li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor's degree or above, with the ability touse English as a working language; </li> <li>Experience in overseas content creator operations and building overseas content ecosystems is preferred.</li> <li>Deep understanding and insights into content formats and creation ecosystems such as short/long videos and live streaming,strong content comprehension, and user empathy, with the ability to drive business growth from a user-centric perspective.</li> <li>Platform-oriented mindset, with experience inuser, creator, and content operations, skilled in retrospectives, and result-and data-driven approach.</li> <li>Strong sense of ownership, excellent project leadership skills, capable of handling multitasking, and independently solve problems with self-driven motivation.</li> <li>Proficiency in Chinese is required for this position, as daily communication and collaboration with game development team based in China are essential to the responsibilities of the position.</li> </ul> <p><strong data-start="190" data-end="199">Note:</strong> All UK-based positions are <strong data-start="227" data-end="260">eligible for visa sponsorship</strong>.</p> </article> <p> </p>

requiredQualifications: Powered by industry-leading in-house R&D capabilities in China and globally, NetEase creates superior gaming experiences, inspires players, and passionately delivers value for its thriving community worldwide.

Continuously track and analyze tournament data, user feedback, and market dynamics to iterate and optimize strategies for maximum project impact.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s degree or above, with 2+ years of experience in esports tournament operations.

Prior experience in esports operation or successful execution of esports events is preferred; experience with shooting game tournaments is a plus.</li> <li>Familiar with one or multiple mainstream esports event systems in the market, and well-acquainted with the ecosystem and operational strategies of community tournaments and self-organized competitions.</li> <li>In-depth understanding of competitive gaming communities, ecosystems, tournament structures, and player dynamic.</li> <li>Proficient in English, able to use it as a working language.</li> <li>Proficiency in Chinese is required for this position, as daily communication and collaboration with game development team based in China are essential to the responsibilities of the position.</li> </ul> <p><strong data-start="190" data-end="199">Note:</strong> All UK-based positions are <strong data-start="227" data-end="260">eligible for visa sponsorship</strong>.</p> <p> </p>

requiredQualifications: Identify and explore opportunities for deeper collaborations, such as brand ambassadorships, long-term partnerships, or exclusive events, to create flagship case studies.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Cross-Functional Collaboration:</strong> Collaborate closely with Marketing, Sales, and other internal teams to support the brand's broader overseas marketing initiatives, ensuring influencer activities are well-integrated.</p> </li> </ol> <hr> <h4><strong>Job Requirements</strong></h4> <ol> <li> <p><strong>Language Proficiency:</strong> Professional working proficiency in Mandarin Chinese (reading and writing) is required for internal communication.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Core Experience:</strong> 1-3+ years of proven experience in influencer marketing or KOL operations.

Must have a successful track record of independently managing end-to-end campaigns in English-speaking markets, from sourcing and negotiation to final performance review.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Project Management Skills:</strong> Strong project planning and execution abilities.

Must be a logical thinker with a high sense of responsibility, capable of efficiently managing multiple projects simultaneously and resolving unexpected challenges.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Tool Proficiency:</strong> Proficient in using influencer marketing and analytics platforms (e.g., AspireIQ, Upfluence, HypeAuditor, etc.).</p> </li> </ol> <hr> <h4><strong>Preferred Qualifications (Bonus Points)</strong></h4> <ol> <li> <p>Candidates with an existing network of influencers in the e-commerce sector are highly preferred.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience studying or working abroad is a significant plus.</p> </li> <li> <p>Direct experience with influencer campaigns focused on driving sales conversions is highly desirable.</p> </li> </ol> <p> </p>

opportunities.roleTitle: User Experience Center - Junior UX Designer
requiredQualifications: Powered by industry-leading in- house R&D capabilities in China and globally, NetEase creates superior gaming experiences, inspires players and passionately delivers value for its thriving community worldwide.

For more information, please visit: http://ir.netease.com/. </p> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph"><strong>Job Description</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">Define the interaction principles between players and game, transforming interfaces into intuitive tools that give players full control and mastery over the game experience.</p> </li> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">Design interaction methods for various gameplay mechanics, helping players engage more effectively with the game and immerse themselves in its emotional journey.</p> </li> </ul> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph"><strong>Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">Passion for gaming and a desire to pursue a career in the game industry, with extensive gaming experience and thoughtful insights into game experience design.</p> </li> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">Familiarity with interaction design theories and proficiency in key design methodologies (e.g., information architecture, task flow analysis, interactive prototyping).</p> </li> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">A user‑centric mindset combined with a rigorous, detail‑oriented approach to design.</p> </li> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">Broad knowledge base and keen observation skills, with a curiosity for new trends and innovations.</p> </li> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">Strong analytical and creative communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively.</p> </li> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">International perspective and cross‑cultural work capability; proficiency in a foreign language as a working language is preferred.</p> </li> </ul> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph"><strong>Application Instructions</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">Please include a link to your portfolio or work samples.</p> </li> <li> <p class="ds-markdown-paragraph">In your resume, highlight your gaming preferences and experience.</p> </li> </ul> <p> </p>

requiredQualifications: Powered by industry-leading in-house R&D capabilities in China andglobally, NetEase creates superior gaming experiences, inspires players, and passionately delivers value for its thriving community worldwide.

For more information, please visit: <a href="http://ir.netease.com/">http://ir.netease.com/</a></p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Responsible for planning and operating overseas gaming communities, developing and executing community strategies and objectives based on the product's market strategy and game version schedule.</li> <li>Oversee the promotional scheduling, publishing, and performance evaluation of game version content within the community.</li> <li>Continuously optimize Discord community functions based on player needs and preferences, ensuring the community meets player needs.</li> <li>Collect and report on player feedback and sentiment; Monitor competing products and new releases in the genre.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s degree or above, with proficiencyin English as a working language.</li> <li>3+ years of experience in operating large overseas gaming communities (Discord), with proven operational expertise in community and platform management, capable of developing and implementing community strategies.</li> <li>Deep gaming experience with overseas titles; familiar with shooter/competitive game genres, with clear insights into player demographics and the gaming industry.</li> <li>Strong communication and execution skills, collaborative team spirit, and a sense of responsibility.</li> <li>Proficiency in Chinese is required for this position, as daily communication and collaboration with game development team based in China are essential to the responsibilities of the position.</li> </ul> <p><strong data-start="190" data-end="199">Note:</strong> All UK-based positions are <strong data-start="227" data-end="260">eligible for visa sponsorship</strong>.</p> </article> <p> </p>

For more information, please visit: <a href="http://ir.netease.com/">http://ir.netease.com/</a></p> </article> <p> </p> <article> <h4><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></h4> <ol> <li>Develop core gameplay mechanics for football/soccer games, including but not limited to: <ul> <li>Football rule systems (offside / foul / referee logic).</li> <li>AI player design (tactical positioning / team coordination / dynamic decision-making).</li> <li>Physics-driven animation systems (collision response / motion fusion / inertial control).</li> <li>Player animation state machine design (dribbling / shooting / tackling animation blending).</li> </ul> </li> <li>Lead end-to-end implementation of technical solutions, from prototyping to performance optimization.</li> <li>Solve cross-module technical challenges (animation-physics synchronization, network consistency, etc.).</li> <li>Write high-quality C++ code and establish technical standards for gameplay modules.</li> </ol> <h4><strong>Required Qualifications:</strong></h4> <div> <ul> <li class="list-item "><strong>Experience</strong>:</li> <ul> <li class="list-item ">5+ years in game development, <strong>with at least 1 shipped sports game title </strong>(football games prioritized).</li> <li class="list-item ">End-to-end ownership of at least 2 projects, covering the full lifecycle from <strong>technical design → development → launch → post-launch iteration.</strong></li> </ul> </ul> </div> <div> <ul> <li class="list-item "><strong>Technical Expertise</strong>: <ul> <li class="list-item ">Football rule systems (FIFA / PES-style rule engines).</li> <li class="list-item ">Athlete AI systems (state machines / behavior trees / utility AI).</li> <li class="list-item ">Physics-driven animation (Motion Matching / Procedural Animation).</li> <li class="list-item ">Animation blend tree optimization (Locomotion / Contact Animation).</li> </ul> </li> <ul> <li class="list-item ">Mastery in at least one domain least above.</li> </ul> </ul> </div> <div> <ul> <li class="list-item "><strong>Expert C++ proficiency </strong>(C++17 features, template metaprogramming, multithreading).</li> </ul> </div> <div> <ul> <li class="list-item "><strong>Engineering Competence</strong>:</li> <ul> <li class="list-item ">Experience with game architectures (ECS / Data-Oriented Design).</li> <li class="list-item ">Proven work in high-performance systems (CPU / memory optimization, SIMD acceleration).</li> <li class="list-item ">Proficiency in industry tools (Unreal Engine / Unity, Perforce / Git).</li> <li class="list-item ">Ability to analyze and deconstruct gameplay implementation solutions.</li> </ul> </ul> </div> <h4><strong>Preferred Qualifications：</strong></h4> <div> <ul> <li class="list-item "><strong>Football Enthusiast</strong>:</li> <ul> <li class="list-item ">Knowledge of football tactics (e.g., Tiki-Taka / Gegenpressing).</li> <li class="list-item ">Understanding of player techniques (e.g., Messi-style dribbling / Ronaldo-style shooting).</li> <li class="list-item ">Amateur football experience or football data analysis background.</li> </ul> </ul> </div> <div> <ul> <li class="list-item "><strong>Technical Breadth</strong>:</li> <ul> <li class="list-item ">Familiarity with network synchronization (state synchronization in sports games)</li> <li class="list-item ">Experience applying ML in game AI (e.g., reinforcement learning for player AI)</li> </ul> </ul> </div> <div> <ul> <li class="list-item "><strong>Soft Skills</strong>:</li> <ul> <li class="list-item ">Proactive knowledge
